South Korea.title: North Korea launches unidentified projectile: Reports.
South Korea.summary: South Korea’s Joint Chiefs of Staff said the projectile was fired from North Pyongan Province and landed in the Yellow Sea.

South Korea.title: South Korea’s President-elect Yoon Suk-yeol names new prime minister.
South Korea.summary: Yoon appointed Han Duck-soo as the next prime minister amid a series of personnel changes in his administration.

Japan.summary: Tokyo, Japan: Japan's government extends financial assistance to Ukrainian refugees.
A former Japanese minister is charged with obstruction of justice related to a government pension scandal.
North Korea fires two ballistic missiles into the ocean just off Japan's western coast, sparking an emergency meeting of the Japanese government.
